lead:
**Lingadevaru H P** (also known as **Thoshan**) is a 22-year-old MCA student at Siddaganga Institute of Technology, Tumakuru, graduating in 2026. He builds deployed projects across blockchain, AI/ML, web development, and self-hosted infrastructure — with a career focus on computer networking, cloud computing, and cybersecurity.

Unlike most peers, he explicitly distinguishes himself as *not a software developer*: his proven strengths are operational — running, deploying, and managing systems. This is evidenced by a portfolio of live public projects: a [[foss-coin|Solana SPL token]] on Orca DEX, a [[thoshan-flash|fine-tuned LLM]] on Hugging Face, an [[insurance-dapp|Ethereum DApp]], and a self-hosted [[homelab|cloud homelab]] architecture.

content.content: The MCA programme at SIT is structured across four semesters. The **3rd semester** was devoted to the [[fraud-detection|Final Year Academic Project]] — an online fraud detection system built and publicly released on GitHub. The **4th (final) semester** consisted of an internship at CHIAC ASI (Panchasutra Ltd, UK), where he served as Team 8 Lead in Research & Publication, completing all three assigned projects.

content.title: Honest Skills Framework
content.content: All skills listed here are demonstrated through real deployed work — not just classroom exposure or tutorials.

**Linux & Systems:** Runs Arch Linux as a daily driver via [[linux-setup|Omarchy]], DHH's opinionated distro with Hyprland Wayland tiling WM. Comfortable with Bash, Git, GitHub, GitLab, Docker, and Kubernetes (exploring).

**Self-Hosting & Deployment:** Deploys and manages containerised services using Docker and Coolify. Self-hosted services include Vaultwarden, SearXNG, Immich, and Pi-hole (see [[homelab|Homelab]]).

**Networking & Security:** Cloudflare DNS management, WireGuard VPN, Pi-hole, AdGuard Home on GL.iNet router, SPF/DKIM/DMARC email records, UFW firewall configuration. Detailed in the [[privacy-stack|Privacy Stack]].

**Blockchain / Web3:** Deployed a live Solana SPL token end-to-end ([[foss-coin|FOSS Coin]], live on Orca DEX) and a fully functional Ethereum smart contract DApp ([[insurance-dapp|Insurance DApp]]).

**AI / ML:** Fine-tuned Google's Gemma-2-9B using QLoRA/PEFT ([[thoshan-flash|Thoshan Flash]], 26+ HF downloads). Built a custom perceptron-style ML regressor for metro arrival time prediction.

**Media Production:** OBS Studio (screen recording with noise gate + RNNoise audio filters), Shotcut video editing.

rows.Detail: National-level recognition by the Central Government of India
Elected lead; managed an 80-member team for SIT's flagship technical event
Established and led a 60–80 member community at Seshadripuram College

content.content: In hackathons, he has participated in three events: an **AI Systems Hackathon** (2025, multi-agent autonomous systems), a **24-Hour Rapid Build Challenge** (2025, privacy-focused e-commerce prototype on Tor), and the **NMIT Web3 Hackathon** (2024, decentralised web application prototype).

rows.Description: $FOSS Solana SPL token — live on Orca DEX

content.content:
The primary career target is **Computer Networking, Cloud Computing, and Cybersecurity** — specifically operational and deployment roles rather than software development. The distinction is deliberate: Python is described as uncomfortable; Java was a struggle. The strengths are in running, deploying, and managing systems.

Evidence-based positioning is a core principle: every claim on the portfolio links to a live project, on-chain transaction, or GitHub repository rather than relying on buzzwords.

For planned certifications and tools being learned, see [[learning-roadmap|Learning Roadmap]].
Skills are proven through live projects, not just theory.
content.author: Personal positioning principle
